title: chylismia brevipes subsp. brevipes
intro: Chylismia brevipes subsp. brevipes, also known as the short-flowered evening primrose, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. This plant contains bioactive compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Chylismia brevipes subsp. brevipes include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, among other benefits. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
